title: KubeVirt Helm Chart Values
description: Configuration values for the KubeVirt Helm chart, which deploys the KubeVirt operator and custom resource without HCO.

global.title: Global Settings
global.description: Global values shared across all sub-charts in the umbrella chart.

imageRegistry.title: Image Registry
imageRegistry.description: Global container image registry to use for all images. When set, overrides the registry portion of image references.

imagePullSecrets.title: Image Pull Secrets
imagePullSecrets.description: Global list of image pull secret names to add to all pods.

nodeSelector.title: Node Selector
nodeSelector.description: Global node selector applied to all operator pods.

tolerations.title: Tolerations
tolerations.description: Global tolerations applied to all operator pods.

kubevirtNamespace.title: KubeVirt Namespace
kubevirtNamespace.description: Default namespace for KubeVirt components, used by this sub-chart and others that need to reference KubeVirt.

namespace.title: Namespace
namespace.description: Namespace for KubeVirt components. Defaults to global.kubevirtNamespace if left empty.

version.title: KubeVirt Version
version.description: Version tag of the KubeVirt release to deploy.

resources.title: Resource Requirements
resources.description: CPU and memory resource requests and limits.

limits.title: Resource Limits
limits.description: Maximum resources the container can use.

nodeSelector.title: Node Selector
nodeSelector.description: Node selector for virt-operator pods. Merged with global.nodeSelector.

tolerations.title: Tolerations
tolerations.description: Tolerations for virt-operator pods. Merged with global.tolerations.

exportProxy.title: Export Proxy
exportProxy.description: Settings for virt-exportproxy external access. Required for Forklift cross-cluster cold migration via VMExport.

externalMode.title: External Mode
externalMode.description: Creates an Ingress and TLS certificate so that VMExport external links are populated. Requires an Ingress controller with backend HTTPS support and cert-manager.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Enable external access to the export proxy via Ingress.

hostname.title: Hostname
hostname.description: FQDN for the export proxy. Must be resolvable from remote clusters.

ingressClassName.title: Ingress Class Name
ingressClassName.description: Ingress class to use for the export proxy Ingress resource (e.g. "nginx").

certManager.title: cert-manager Settings
certManager.description: cert-manager integration for automatic TLS certificate generation.

issuerRef.title: Issuer Reference
issuerRef.description: cert-manager issuer reference. If empty, a self-signed Issuer is created automatically.

name.title: Issuer Name
name.description: Name of the cert-manager Issuer or ClusterIssuer.

group.title: Issuer Group
group.description: API group of the issuer resource.

cr.title: KubeVirt Custom Resource
cr.description: Settings applied to the KubeVirt CR that the operator reconciles.

configuration.title: Configuration
configuration.description: KubeVirtConfiguration spec passed directly into the KubeVirt CR.

featureGates.title: Feature Gates
featureGates.description: List of KubeVirt feature gates to enable.

useEmulation.title: Use Emulation
useEmulation.description: Use software emulation instead of /dev/kvm. Useful for dev/CI environments without nested virt support.

network.title: Network Configuration
network.description: Network-related configuration for KubeVirt (e.g. default network interface, binding plugins).

migrations.title: Migration Configuration
migrations.description: Live migration tuning parameters (bandwidth, timeouts, parallelism, etc.).

liveUpdateConfiguration.title: Live Update Configuration
liveUpdateConfiguration.description: Configuration for live-updating VM workloads (CPU, memory hotplug limits).

evictionStrategy.title: Eviction Strategy
evictionStrategy.description: Default eviction strategy for VMs when a node is drained.

permittedHostDevices.title: Permitted Host Devices
permittedHostDevices.description: Host devices (PCI, mediated devices) that may be exposed to VMs.

mediatedDevicesConfiguration.title: Mediated Devices Configuration
mediatedDevicesConfiguration.description: Configuration for vGPU passthrough via mediated devices (mdev).

mediatedDeviceTypes.title: Mediated Device Types
mediatedDeviceTypes.description: List of mediated device types to configure (e.g. nvidia-222, nvidia-228).

nodeMediatedDeviceTypes.title: Node-specific Mediated Device Types
nodeMediatedDeviceTypes.description: Per-node mediated device type configuration with node selectors.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Enable creation and removal of mediated devices by virt-handler.

imagePullPolicy.title: Image Pull Policy
imagePullPolicy.description: Image pull policy for KubeVirt component images managed by the operator.

monitorNamespace.title: Monitor Namespace
monitorNamespace.description: Namespace where monitoring resources (ServiceMonitors) are created. Leave empty to use the KubeVirt namespace.

monitorAccount.title: Monitor Service Account
monitorAccount.description: ServiceAccount name used by the monitoring stack (e.g. Prometheus) to scrape KubeVirt metrics.

customizeComponents.title: Customize Components
customizeComponents.description: Patches to apply to KubeVirt-managed Deployments, DaemonSets, and other resources.

workloadUpdateStrategy.title: Workload Update Strategy
workloadUpdateStrategy.description: Strategy for updating running VM workloads when KubeVirt is upgraded.

certificateRotateStrategy.title: Certificate Rotate Strategy
certificateRotateStrategy.description: Strategy for rotating internal TLS certificates used by KubeVirt components.
